channel.title: CWE-345 on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in CWE-345 on ZAP

item.title: Content-Type Header Empty
item.description: The Content-Type header was either missing or empty.

item.title: Content-Type Header Missing
item.description: The Content-Type header was either missing or empty.

item.title: JWT None Algorithm (Authorization header)
item.description:
This attack occurs when an attacker alters the token and changes the hashing algorithm to indicate, through the none keyword, that the integrity of the token has already been verified

Generated by OWASP PTK DAST Module

item.title: JWT None Algorithm (Cookie)
item.description:
This attack occurs when an attacker alters the token and changes the hashing algorithm to indicate, through the none keyword, that the integrity of the token has already been verified

Generated by OWASP PTK DAST Module

item.title: JWT None Algorithm (Form body param)
item.description:
This attack occurs when an attacker alters the token and changes the hashing algorithm to indicate, through the none keyword, that the integrity of the token has already been verified

Generated by OWASP PTK DAST Module

item.title: JWT None Algorithm (JSON body)
item.description:
This attack occurs when an attacker alters the token and changes the hashing algorithm to indicate, through the none keyword, that the integrity of the token has already been verified

Generated by OWASP PTK DAST Module

item.title: JWT Probe (Authorization + JWT cookies removed)
item.description:
This attack occurs when an attacker alters the token and changes the hashing algorithm to indicate, through the none keyword, that the integrity of the token has already been verified

Generated by OWASP PTK DAST Module

item.title: JWT Probe (Authorization header removed)
item.description:
This attack occurs when an attacker alters the token and changes the hashing algorithm to indicate, through the none keyword, that the integrity of the token has already been verified

Generated by OWASP PTK DAST Module

item.title: JWT Probe (JWT cookies removed)
item.description:
This attack occurs when an attacker alters the token and changes the hashing algorithm to indicate, through the none keyword, that the integrity of the token has already been verified

Generated by OWASP PTK DAST Module

item.title: Sub Resource Integrity Attribute Missing
item.description: The integrity attribute is missing on a script or link tag served by an external server. The integrity tag prevents an attacker who have gained access to this server from injecting a malicious content.
